title: Russia handed diplomatic note over crash of Ukrainian drone in Latvia
summary_full: Latvia's Ministry of Foreign Affairs said that on March 25th it had summoned a Russian diplomat – not for the first time – to be handed a protest note in connection with that country's warmongering.
summary_public: Latvia's Ministry of Foreign Affairs said that on March 25th it had summoned a Russian diplomat – not for the first time – to be handed a protest note in connection with that country's warmongering.

LV.label: negative
LV.evidence: summoned a Russian diplomat – not for the first time – to be handed a protest note

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: handed a protest note in connection with that country's warmongering.
